Title: Order History - View Orders
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
User has at least one previous order, user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[WAIT] Wait for orders list to load
[ASSERT] Verify orders list rendered
[ASSERT] Verify orders sorted with most recent first
[ASSERT] Verify each order row shows: order number, date, status, total
[ASSERT] Verify at least one order visible
Assertions:
[DOM] Orders list rendered with at least one row
[DOM] Order number, date, status, total shown per row
[STATE] Orders sorted descending by date (most recent first)
[DOM] Link to order detail available per row
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders returns list with correct fields
[CONSOLE] No errors loading order history
Failure_Signals: Orders list empty when orders exist; orders not sorted correctly

Title: Order History - View Details
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
At least one order exists in user's history, user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on an existing order to view detail
[WAIT] Wait for order detail page to load
[ASSERT] Verify line items displayed (name, qty, price)
[ASSERT] Verify shipping address section shown
[ASSERT] Verify payment info shown (masked)
[ASSERT] Verify order status shown
[ASSERT] Verify order total breakdown visible
Assertions:
[DOM] Line items with name, quantity, unit price rendered
[DOM] Shipping address section rendered
[DOM] Payment method shown (no full card numbers)
[DOM] Status label visible
[DOM] Subtotal, shipping, tax, grand total shown
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns full order detail
[CONSOLE] No 404 or 500 errors on detail page
Failure_Signals: Order detail page shows no line items; clicking order link results in error page

[ACT] Locate the order identified by {{BOPIS_PICKUP_ORDER}} and click to view detail
[ASSERT] Verify pickup location name and address shown
[ASSERT] Verify store hours shown if available
[ASSERT] Verify pickup instructions or ready-for-pickup notification shown
[ASSERT] Verify no delivery shipping address section shown (pickup order)

[DOM] Pickup location name and address rendered
[DOM] Store hours section present if configured
[DOM] Pickup instructions text visible
[STATE] No delivery shipping address section shown for pickup order
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns fulfillmentType = pickup
[CONSOLE] No rendering errors for pickup order type
Failure_Signals: Pickup location details missing; delivery address shown instead of pickup info

Title: Order - Delivery Details Display

{{SHIPPED_ORDER}} env var set; user logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
Steps:

Title: Order Status - New
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in, order just placed through storefront
Steps:
[NAV] Complete checkout and place order via storefront
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on newly placed order
[ASSERT] Verify order status displayed as 'New'
[ASSERT] Verify status visible on both order list row and detail page
[ASSERT] Verify status label matches configured display text
Assertions:
[DOM] Status label = 'New' on order list row
[DOM] Status label = 'New' on order detail page
[STATE] Status visible immediately after order placement without page reload
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns status = New
[CONSOLE] No errors loading order status
Failure_Signals: Status not shown after order placement; status shows wrong value (e.g. Pending instead of New)

Title: Order Status - Processing (Admin-Driven)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
Order in New status exists (place via CHK-022 or use fresh New order); admin access available
Test_Data: url={{FRONT_URL}}, admin={{ADMIN_URL}}, admin_user={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}, admin_pass={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}, user={{USER_EMAIL}}, password={{USER_PASSWORD}}
Steps:
[NAV] Place a new order via storefront or use any existing New order; note the order number
[NAV] Navigate to {{ADMIN_URL}}/orders and locate the target order by order number
[ACT] Update order status to 'Processing' in admin; save
[WAIT] Wait for admin save to confirm (no error toast)
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders in storefront
[ACT] Open the same order detail page
[ASSERT] Verify status label shows 'Processing'
[COND: timeline feature present] Verify New → Processing transition appears in timeline
Assertions:
[DOM] Status = 'Processing' on order detail page after admin update
[STATE] Status update reflected on storefront without requiring re-login
[COND: timeline present] Order history shows New → Processing transition
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns status = Processing after admin update
[ADMIN] Admin order detail confirms status = Processing
[CONSOLE] No JS errors on status refresh in storefront
Failure_Signals: Storefront still shows 'New' after admin sets Processing; admin save throws error
Cleanup: Revert order to New via admin if needed for other tests

Title: Order Status - Shipped with Tracking Number
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
Order in New or Processing status exists (fresh order or {{PROCESSING_ORDER}} env var); admin access available
Test_Data: url={{FRONT_URL}}, admin={{ADMIN_URL}}, admin_user={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}, admin_pass={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}, user={{USER_EMAIL}}, password={{USER_PASSWORD}}, tracking_number={{SAMPLE_TRACKING_NUMBER}}
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{ADMIN_URL}}/orders and find a Processing or New order; note order number
[ACT] Update order status to 'Shipped' in admin
[ACT] Enter {{SAMPLE_TRACKING_NUMBER}} (any non-empty alphanumeric string) as tracking number; enter carrier name
[WAIT] Wait for admin save to confirm with no error
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders in storefront
[ACT] Open the same order detail
[ASSERT] Verify status shows 'Shipped'
[ASSERT] Verify tracking number displayed (matches value entered in admin)
[ASSERT] Verify carrier name displayed
[ASSERT] Verify tracking number is a clickable anchor link
Assertions:
[DOM] Status = 'Shipped' on order detail
[DOM] Tracking number matches value entered in admin
[DOM] Carrier name visible
[DOM] Tracking number rendered as anchor (href present)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns status = Shipped with shipmentDetails.trackingNumber populated
[ADMIN] Shipment details saved correctly in admin
[CONSOLE] No errors rendering tracking section
Failure_Signals: Tracking number not shown in storefront after admin update; tracking displayed as plain text not a link
Cleanup: none — intentional test action; leave order in Shipped state

[ACT] Open the Completed order detail page
[ASSERT] Verify status shows 'Completed'
[COND: buyer-cancel feature enabled] Verify 'Cancel Order' button is absent or disabled for Completed orders
Assertions:
[DOM] Status = 'Completed' on order detail
[COND: buyer-cancel enabled] Cancel order button absent or disabled for completed orders
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns status = Completed

[CONSOLE] No errors on completed order detail page

Title: Reorder - Add to Cart
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] Locate order {{COMPLETED_ORDER}} (or any completed order visible) and click to view detail
[WAIT] Wait for order detail page to load
[COND: reorder feature enabled] Verify 'Reorder' button visible on order detail page
[COND: reorder feature enabled] [ACT] click 'Reorder all'
[WAIT] Wait for items to be added to cart
[ASSERT] Verify success notification or cart count badge update confirms items added
[ASSERT] Verify cart count badge updates
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] Verify reordered items present in cart with correct quantities
Assertions:
[COND: reorder feature enabled] 'Reorder' button visible on completed order detail
[STATE] Success notification or cart badge update shown after clicking Reorder
[DOM] Cart count updates after Reorder
[DOM] Cart contains all line items from the reordered order with matching quantities
[STATE] Existing cart items not replaced (items added)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addItemsToCart or equivalent mutation returns success
[CONSOLE] No errors during reorder action
Failure_Signals: Reorder button absent when feature is enabled; items not added to cart; cart count not updated after reorder
References: REQUIRES-COMPLETED-ORDER: Reorder button is gated by order status=Completed; resolve {{COMPLETED_ORDER}} via live-discover or seed (Coverage Gap Analysis)

Title: Reorder - Current Prices
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
{{COMPLETED_ORDER}} env var set (an older order); user logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; reorder feature enabled
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] Locate order {{COMPLETED_ORDER}} and open its detail; note the original unit prices recorded on the order
[COND: reorder feature enabled] [ACT] click 'Reorder all'
[WAIT] Wait for items added to cart
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] Verify no system error is thrown even if current prices differ from order prices
[ASSERT] Verify cart total reflects current catalog pricing (not frozen historical prices)
[ASSERT] Verify cart is functional and can proceed to checkout
Assertions:
[STATE] No system error thrown when cart prices differ from historical order prices
[MATH] Cart total uses current catalog prices (verify one item price against live PDP price if discrepancy observed)
[DOM] Cart functional and can proceed to checkout
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addItemsToCart mutation succeeds; no price-mismatch error returned
[API] Product price API returns current prices for reordered SKUs
[CONSOLE] No errors on price calculation
Failure_Signals: System error thrown when prices differ; cart shows historical order prices instead of current; cart total uses stale prices
References: REQUIRES-COMPLETED-ORDER: Reorder button is gated by order status=Completed; resolve {{COMPLETED_ORDER}} via live-discover or seed (Coverage Gap Analysis)

[CONSOLE] No unhandled exceptions when invoice not available

Title: Reorder - Discontinued Item Handled Gracefully

[PRE:RESET_CART]

Title: Reorder into Non-Empty Cart - Items Merge

[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]

Steps: [NAV] Open order {{COMPLETED_ORDER}} detail; [KEY] note first item SKU from order (call it Item A) and its quantity; [NAV] navigate to Item A product page and add qty 1 to cart; [WAIT] verify cart badge shows 1; [NAV] navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click 'Reorder all' on order {{COMPLETED_ORDER}}; [WAIT] wait for cart page to load; [ASSERT] verify Item A appears only once in cart (no duplicate rows); [ASSERT] verify Item A quantity = 1 (pre-existing) + order qty (merged); [ASSERT] verify other items from the reordered order are also present; [ASSERT] verify success notification shown
